text:
Created attachment 250967
Update to pkg_replace-20240526

Oh, my mistake! pkg_replace-20240525 has build error bug.

pkg_replace-20240526 with fixed bug has released.

* Fix build error.
* Improved the summary message.
* Cleanup options. Add "--no-verbose", "--no-config" and "--no-force-config", etc.
